name: Minerva Singletary
narrative: Dean of Math and Science at Austin Achieve Public Schools (Aug 2024-present). Previously Elementary School Teacher at Pflugerville ISD, 3rd Grade Teacher at Harmony Public Schools, Elementary School Teacher at Manor ISD, and Bilingual Interventionist at Pflugerville ISD. M.Ed. in Curriculum and Instruction from Western Governors University; BS in Multi-/Interdisciplinary Studies from Texas State University.
